name: Paperclip Session Hider
description: Hide Paperclip/Hermes tool-origin session rows such as repeated generic "Tool Session" entries from the Hermes WebUI conversation sidebar without deleting or archiving them.
author: nesquena-hermes

settings_schema.label: Hide Paperclip tool sessions
settings_schema.description: Hide matching tool-origin rows from the conversation sidebar. This only changes visibility in this browser.

settings_schema.label: Rows to hide
settings_schema.description: Generic mode hides repeated Tool Session rows only. All tool-origin mode also hides named tool-origin rows such as approval sessions.
